summary: Added durable ordinary-program loop state to `examples/feedback-loop/Main.clasp`. The loop now writes `state.json`, exposes `CLASP_LOOP_COMMAND=status`, and records terminal `pass`/`fail` instead of only leaving verifier feedback behind. Updated `scripts/test-native-claspc.sh` to verify both the converged two-attempt path and a one-attempt terminal failure path, including persisted status fields.
residual_risks: This change tightens the ordinary-program feedback-loop path, but the full swarm-ready goal still depends on broader repository capabilities outside this slice.

feedback.summary: The repository already had most of the ordinary-program loop substrate; the missing piece in this slice was durable final-state recording and a live-readable status surface for the loop itself.
ergonomics: `examples/feedback-loop/Main.clasp` now exposes a small monitoring surface via `CLASP_LOOP_COMMAND=status` without adding shell-wrapper dependencies.
The loop now persists explicit pass/fail state, builder/verifier run counts, and attention metadata in ordinary runtime storage.
follow_ups: If the verifier still finds full-goal gaps, the next likely high-value slice is expanding ordinary-program supervision around the richer swarm/control-plane flows, not just the minimal feedback loop.
warnings: `scripts/test-native-claspc.sh` already had unrelated in-flight additions in this checkout; I preserved and worked with those edits rather than reverting them.
